description:
Gus: Oh, I'm so glad to hear you say that. I was kind of worried about telling you.
Shawn: Don't be a silly goose.

Gus: Are you out of your mind? You rented office space for this?
Shawn: Gus, don't be a crazy hooligan. I rented a sign.

Gus: Well, Mr. Peterson, this sounds like a case for the police. Let me get you a number.
Shawn: Gus, don't be a gooey chocolate chip cookie.
Gus: What?

Gus: Whoa, no calls either.
Shawn: Gus, don't be a rabid porcupine.

Gus: I came all the way down from the office, Shawn.
Shawn: Gus, don't be a giant snapping turtle. We'll have a case in five minutes.

Gus: Shawn. I think we're not welcomed here.
Shawn: Gus, don't be a paranoid schizophrenic. We're always welcome here.

Gus: We spent two hours riding up to that mushroom farm, and we're right back to when we started.
Shawn: Don't be such a gloomy you, Gus. Look at the bright side.

Gus: No, Shawn, you're not doing this to me again. No, not this time. Not with a criminal in the back of my car.
Shawn: Gus, don't be a little girl about this, okay? It's only gonna take five minutes.

Gus: I tried, Shawn. I can't do this.
Shawn: Gus, don't bea traveling wilbury.

Gus: That's easy for you to say, Shawn. Nobody had any expectations you would amount to greatness.
Shawn: Gus, don't be an incorrigible Eskimo Pie with a caramel ribbon.

Gus: Deboned? Killed and rekilled? How does that even work?
Shawn: Gus, don't be an old sponge with hair hanging off of it. I'm all over this case.

Gus: All I'm saying is, so much for us being in Chief Vick's good graces. We may have just burned our bridge with her.
Shawn: Gus, don't be a myopic chihuahua. I have a fool-proof plan that not only solves the case but gives Chief all the credit.

Gus: Did you listen to anything your dad said? The map is the screen.
Shawn: Gus, don't be exactly half of an 11-pound black forest ham.

Gus: Right. So what are we doing? Are we really done?
Shawn: Gus, don't be William Zabka from Back to School.

Gus: Dude, the clock is ticking on some guy's life and you're out getting a milkshake?
Shawn: Gus, don't be this crevice in my arm. This isn't a milkshake, it's a smoothie. There's a huge difference.

Look, Shawn, I know you're upset, but if we give up now...
Shawn: Gus, don't be The Last of the Famous International Playboys. We're not giving up, okay? Far from it.

Gus: This is an airport, Shawn. We can't sniff around. I don't want to end up in Guantanamo.
Shawn: Gus, don't be principal and interest. I already have plan.

Gus: I don't know what we're gonna find here. The shooter's back at the motel.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the ribs that flip over Fred Flintstone's car.

Gus: You don't think Lassiter may be right?
Shawn: Gus, please. Don't be Harry Potter and the prisoner of marzipan.

Gus: You heard Lassiter. We need a police detail.
Shawn: Don't be the American adaptation of the British Gus.

Gus: This may be above our pay grade.
Shawn: Don't be the third Thompson twin with the dreads. This is exactly at our pay grade. Plus, we're his only hope.

Gus: So now you're gonna tell me Monkey brush doesn't even exist?
Shawn: Don't be the new Meshach Taylor.

Gus: This is your fix, Shawn? The man is a convicted murderer. He will kill us.
Shawn: Don't be the 'it' in 'wait for it!' This is gonna work great.

Gus: Shawn?
Shawn: Gus, relax. Don't be Nic Cage's accent from Con Air. We've bathed together before.

Gus: Yeah. I need to get off this boat.
Shawn: Gus, don't be Leon from the Like a Prayer video.

Gus: It's pi.
Shawn: Gus, don't be Topher Grace Running on the beach at the end of 'Good Company'.

Gus: Shawn, we got lucky because we hid like little girls.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the ten tigers of canton. We've reached a new level.

Juliet: So we have to figure out how Ben is involved, but I don't think they're going to be cooperative, seeing that we don't have a warrant.
Shawn: Jules, don't be Canada. I'll handle this.

Gus: Shawn, this isn't happening.
Shawn: Gus, don't be George Hamilton's reaction when Ashley came to him and said 'Dad, I think I'll become an actor too.' Keep an open mind. This is about solving a murder.

Gus: It's obvious, Shawn. It's Tommy.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the second drummer from .38 special. Clearly it wasn't Tommy.

Gus: Are you sure that's what your dad said?
Shawn: Gus, don't be the one game at Chuck E. Cheese that isn't broken. By the time the cops arrive, these prisoners will be halfway from here to the Pacific Ocean.

Gus: Nadia is gonna find us and kill us.
Shawn: Gus, don't be a fine young cannibals cover of Suspicious Minds. We're gonna find her.

Gus: We're gonna get arrested, aren't we?
Shawn: Gus, don't be the only black lead on a major cable network. My dad's never had me arrested.
Gus: Yes, he has, Shawn.

Gus: You don't really think a ghost did this, do you?
Shawn: Gus, don't be a jury summons I accidentally threw in the trash last month along with something called a W2. It's never a ghost.

Gus: Shawn, we're gonna die in this tiny, stupid room.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the scream from holding back the years. You're right, though. This could be it for us.

Gus: Now they look like amateurs, and Psych might be finished.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the way Eriq la Salle spells 'Eriq'. You know I would never go snooping around willy-nilly.

Gus: You Look tired.
Shawn: Gus. Don't be Keith Sweat now. I'm sharp as a tack.

Gus: Let's just go, Shawn. We're not gonna find him here.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the mystery mouseketool.

Gus: That doesn't sound simple, Shawn.
Shawn: Gus, don't be Pete Rose's haircut.

Gus: Where do you get your information from, Shawn?
Shawn: Gus, don't be Lao Che.
Gus: Who?

Gus: Really?
Shawn: Ow! Gus, don't be the 'B' from apartment 23! You're better than that! We're all better than that! At least, I think we are.

Gus: I'm cool with it. I'm a family man now.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the remake of Yours, Mine, and Ours. For that matter, don't be the original either. It's okay to admit that you're freaking out on the inside.

Gus: No, panther scat.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the second time ever I saw your face.
Gus: I know my scat, Shawn.

Shawn: Time out. What is this? She's doing our 'C'mon, sons'?
Gus: No.
Rachael: Oh, Shawn, don't be such a Filipino Steve Perry.
Shawn: That doesn't make any sense.

Shawn: Be tough, man. Don't be weepy-boy Santos.
Lassiter: All right, Guster, keep him on the line.

Shawn: Gus, don't be the kites upon strings.
Shawn: We need to be a tad more cautious with our little secret.

Gus: You are embarrassing us.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the very model of a modern Major General. Look at those shells.

Gus: Shawn, if Ronnie catches us, he's gonna kill us.
Shawn: Gus, don't be The Howling 2: Your Sister's A Werewolf.

Gus: Dude, if Trout sees us inside here, he's probably gonna have us arrested.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the 100th Luftballon. We both know that yous and mees hit rock bottom, okay?

Gus: Shawn, we are eight feet underground at the end of an alley in Chinatown.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the comma in Earth, Wind & Fire. This is a glorious triumph, especially considering all the restrictions you gave me.

Gus: Shawn, we need to get out of here.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the tender sweetness of a seasick crocodile.

Gus: Shawn, there is no way that dog doesn't eat your face.
Shawn: Guys, don't be the C above middle C in 'Those Endearing Young Charms'.

Gus: No, Shawn. No more embarrassing nicknames, especially in front of peers and professionals.
Shawn: Gus, don't be the night your dad fell asleep inside your mom. We can't just stop doing bits we've been doing for ten years. We have fans. There'll be a huge backlash.
